**Tag:** `vX.Y.Z`

This release publishes an updated `ContinuousDelphi.Tools` PowerShell module.

# Quick Usage

```powershell
Import-Module ./src/ContinuousDelphi.Tools
Test-NonAsciiContent -FileSpec *.md -Recurse
```
